title: Arthur Krock
body: Arthur Bernard Krock (November 16, 1886 – April 12, 1974) was a Pulitzer Prize-winning American journalist. He became known as the "Dean of Washington newsmen" in a career that spanned the tenure of 11 United States presidents.
categories: Burials at Oak Hill Cemetery (Washington, D.C.)
